coverage_note: Includes assets exposed by the official ministries, faith, friends, photos, activity, Christmas, Grenada, and Haiti pages. The Sunday gallery was protected by an anti-bot challenge and could not be fully inventoried.
rights_policy: Do not treat publication on the legacy website as proof of unrestricted copyright. Obtain church confirmation before migrating photographs, especially images containing children, vulnerable adults, mission participants, or third parties.
